nodes.label: AI as initial orientation tool for complex documents
nodes.label_negative: AI as sole source of understanding without human review
nodes.grounding_span: summarizing complex legislation so I have an idea of the topic before I dive into it myself

nodes.label: AI accuracy and source verifiability
nodes.label_negative: AI inaccuracy and lack of source citation
nodes.grounding_span: accuracy and citing sources, especially since we work with legislation where truth and verifiability are key

nodes.label: AI understanding of complex nuanced tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI failure to grasp complex questions and provide lacking information
nodes.grounding_span: it felt like it didn't fully understand the (admittedly complex) question, which then led to lacking information

nodes.label: Human retention of core competencies
nodes.label_negative: Over-reliance on AI leading to skill atrophy
nodes.grounding_span: If a meteor hit every data center tomorrow, I need to still be able to do my job

nodes.label: AI for routine data organization tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI for creative and fun tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I like handling the creative tasks myself. I like writing and flexing my creative muscles

nodes.label: Efficient comprehension and time-saving
nodes.grounding_span: I can do the research and condensing myself, but it's timely

nodes.label: Truth and verifiability in legislative work
Professional autonomy and skill independence
nodes.grounding_span: I need to still be able to do my job

nodes.label: Personal creative fulfillment
nodes.grounding_span: I like writing and flexing my creative muscles

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for initial summaries
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI a moderate amount during my typical workday

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's inability to handle complex research
nodes.grounding_span: I felt like the model just wasn't getting the type of information I was hoping for

nodes.label: Cautious optimism about expanding AI use if improved
nodes.grounding_span: I could see expanding my usage if it improved in its ability to do research

nodes.label: Preference for human handling of creative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I don't really want to outsource the 'fun' tasks

nodes.label: Sequential layering: AI summary then human deep-dive
nodes.grounding_span: I'll take a bill summary and have our in-house AI model provide a summary... Then, I'll go through the bill line by line

nodes.label: Independence-preserving tool use: AI as time-saver for own capabilities
nodes.grounding_span: I can do the research and condensing myself, but it's timely
